Oflow Menu
We are a scratch bakery with no added preservatives, so our menu items may change throughout the week and months. However, you will always get freshly baked items, freshly brewed premium coffee, tea from loose leaves, and Boba Tea with no synthetic ingredients. All prices are subject to change, with the most up-to-date prices in the shop.
Pre-order Menu
Valentines and Mardi Gras Menu for Preorders are here!
Order today: made-from-scratch King Cake (Cream Cheese Butter Cream, Coffee Flavored Cream Cheese Butter Cream, or Caramel Dulce de Leche), and Chocolate-Covered Strawberries in a Valentine's Tin.
BREWS MENU - Updated Prices at Cafe
Coffee - Premium Locally Roasted Coffee from Narrow Gate Coffee Co.
whole milk can be substituted with oat or coconut milk
Americano - 12 oz, 16 oz, 16 oz Iced
$3.00, $4.00, $3.50
American-style coffee - Expresso watered down
Cappuccino - 12 oz
$3.50
Cappuccino coffee
-
equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and foam (⅓ each).
Cold Brew/ Flash Brew - 12 oz, 16 oz
$3.00, $3.50
Cold Brew/ Flash Brew style coffee - Pour over coffee flash chilled to retain coffee flavor and not watered down with ice
Drip Coffee - 8 oz, 12 oz, 16 oz
$2.50, $3.00, $3.50
Drip coffee - coffee poured over filter dripped, dispensed in carafe for the quick grab and go coffee
Espresso Shot
$2.00
Expresso Shot - When you need straight up expresso without any frills for the quick pick me up
Latte - 8 oz, 12 oz, 16 oz, 16 oz iced
$4.00, $4.50, $5.00, $4.75
Latte coffee - like a cappuccino but with more foam and milk blended with expresso with latte art. Our most popular drink
Macchiato - 8 oz, 12 oz, 16 oz, 16 oz iced
$4.00, $4.50, $5.00, $4.75
Macchiato coffee - expresso with a dash of milk
Nitro - 16 oz
$4.50
Nitro Brew coffee - cold brew coffee infused with nitrogen giving it a foamy texture like drinking an expresso beer
Pour Over - 16 oz
$5.00
Pour over coffee - Pour over coffee controlling taste and temperature with precision balance of water and timing
Hot Chocolate - 8 oz, 12 oz, 16 oz
$2.00, $3.00, $3.75
Hot Chocolate made with cacao powder
Tea - Fresh Brewed from Loose Leaves
Select tea from Music City Tea, supporting our Local Community Business. Various tea flavors include Black Tea, Chai, Earl Grey, Hawaiian Paradise, Fruit Tea, Jasmine Green, Matcha, Oolong Black, and Oolong Green.
Hot Tea - 12 oz, 16 oz
$3.00, $4.00
Hot Tea - Freshly brewed in an individual pot and poured into individual cups
Iced Tea - 12 oz, 16 oz
$3.00, $4.00
Ice tea - Freshly brewed in an individual pot and poured into ice
Tea Latte - 12 oz, 16 oz, 16 oz iced
$4.50, $5.00, $4.75
Tea latte - Freshly brewed in an individual pot and poured into cup with added milk foam
Bubble Tea / Boba Tea
Tea or no tea drink flavored with fruit or milk flavors with toppings to make it a fun drink. 1) Choose Milk or Fruit Tea 2) Add Black Tea or Not 3) Choose Topping
Milk Tea / Milk Boba Tea - 16 oz
$5.45
Milk Tea flavors:
Classic Milk Tea, Thai Tea, Chai Tea, Taro, Coconut, Mango, Strawberry, Blueberry, Pineapple, Peach, Honeydew, Brown Sugar, Lavender, Earl Grey, Chocolate, Tiramisu, Matcha
Fruit Flavor Boba Tea - 16 oz
$5.45
Fruit Tea flavors:
Blueberry, Strawberry, White Peach, Taiwanese Mango, Hawaiian Paradise, Grape, Green Apple, Guava, Rose
Boba Toppings
Included but can add additional topping for 50 cents
Toppings:
Traditional Tapioca Boba
Jellies:
Mixed Fruit, Lychee, Mango Star, Strawberry Hearts, Pineapple
Popping Boba:
Green Apple, Passion Fruit, Mango, Peach, Kiwi, Strawberry
Special of the Week Boba Tea
$5.45 to $5.95
A bobs tea, fruit or milk tea, that has been paired with toppings that is popular among our staff or customer. Try it for a special reduced price. Follow us on social media on the special of the week.
Seasonal flavors and syrups available to enhance your drinks.
BAKES MENU -  - Updated Prices at Cafe
Savories
Fresh baked savory items for breakfast, lunch, or dinner
Muffin with Choice of Egg, Cheese, and choice of Meat
$7.50
Freshly baked homemade from scratch English muffins make all the difference. Choice of chicken or pork sausage made in-house with sage or bacon.
Hand Pie with Beef or Chicken
$7.50
Flaky-crusted pie dough filled with ground beef or chicken with many spices and veggies to make it a wholesome grab-and-go meal. Bringing an English delicacy to TN. Only available here!
Specials of Week
$7.00 to $12.50
Check-in social media or here for weekly specials
Sweets and Desserts
Pastries baked daily from scratch without preservatives made with real sugar, butter, eggs, and just sweet enough! If you need to indulge, do it with real food and ingredients, your body and brain will know and thank you.
Cheesecakes - Variety  (4 in)
8.50
Our famous New York Style cheesecake with real cream cheese, a touch of sour cream, lots of eggs, the right amount of sugar, and a little flour on top of buttered graham crackers make the perfect base for a variety of cheesecakes offered. These eye candies taste great and are usually sold out by the end of the day.
Cinnamon Rolls with whipped cream cheese frosting
$5.00
Our cinnamon rolls are made from yeast dough filled with butter, cinnamon, and more butter and cinnamon. It's a popular item that is usually sold out at midday.
Brownies with Whipped Cream Frosting and homemade Caramel Sauce
$7.00
Our brownies are made with simple ingredients, except we use premium Belgian Chocolate wafers that give it an extra richness without being overly sweet. The whipped cream topped with our homemade caramel sauce makes it even more extraordinary.
Cookies - variety
$2.50
Our cookies are buttery, and soft but not too soft, with the finest ingredients. Variety of flavors including chocolate, oatmeal raisin, snickerdoodle, turtle, and sugar cookies.
Muffins - Variety
$5.00
A variety of muffins made in-house include blueberry, lemon poppy seed, and apple
Cheesecake Truffles
2 for $5.00 or 4 for $8.50 or 8 for $16
Our cheesecake truffles use our famous recipe covered with Belgian Chocolate—a popular treat for all ages.
Cupcakes with Butter Cream Frosting - variety
$3.00
Cupcakes with our homemade buttercream frosting in vanilla or chocolate and sometimes red velvet make a delicious treat, and you will not feel guilty about eating a whole cake since there is a debate that cupcakes are not real cakes.
Pies and Tarts - Variety (4 in)
$7
Our individual-sized pies with butter crust filled with fun combos, such as peanut butter banana cream pie with nutter butter chocolate, coconut cream, key lime, and apple, sell out quickly.
Specials
$4 to $45
Depending on the holiday or when we have the capacity, we will have special items, preorders, and catering. Follow us on social media or contact us!
Slice of Cake
$6.50
Get a slice of our delicious scratch made cakes made with fresh ingredients from fruits to nuts to Belgian chocolate ganache to butter scream frosting. Follow us on FB and instagram for updates!
Truffle Cake Pops
$3.25
A variety of cake pops also made with fresh ingredient.
Gluten Free Cupcake and other desserts
$3.50 to ???
Check often on our gluten free options. Please note that although we will practice best precautions to ensure no cross contamination, the kitchen does not have a separate gluten free section so if you are allergic please seek another facility that is solely gluten free. There is none in downtown.
Banana Pudding
$7.25
Rich creamy banana pudding with cookies
Let us know what you are looking for! Contact us or stop in!
